{{Quote|The Sith make such trouble for me and business has been slow.|translated=1|Yortal Ixlis, to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Yortal Ixlis''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] who lived in [[Ahto City]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Around [[3956 BBY]], he owned [[Yortal's Emporium]] and was often harassed by the local [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith]]. He came to run a used goods shop when he failed at a task for a [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]] executive and was forced to open his shop on [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]] to pay off the debt. Ixlis knew little of Manaan, as he worked all day and slept all night. When the amnesiac [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] visited his shop, he witnessed a Sith soldier mocking Ixlis.

Later, after Revan [[Raid on the Sith Embassy|raided]] the [[Sith Embassy]] on Manaan and exposed their plot to overthrow the government of that [[Planet/Legends|world]], Ixlis offered Revan a discount on his wares.

==Behind the scenes==
Despite him being an Ithorian, the Sith soldier comments to Yortal that "you fish are a strange breed."

In ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', the player can have Revan threaten Yortal when they first meet, resulting in Revan's alignment to the dark side to grow.
